headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 12, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants suffered a 6-2 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, with Casey Schmitt leading the Giants' offense. In other action, the Arizona Diamondbacks edged the Philadelphia Phillies 4-3, while the Minnesota Twins took down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-2. The Los Angeles Angels secured a 9-6 victory over the Cincinnati Reds.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams, with Tyler O'Neill being placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion. Hunter Harvey has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation, and George Springer is out with a left great toe fracture. Adley Rutschman has been placed on the 10-day injured list with left ankle inflammation, and Royce Lewis is on the 10-day injured list with a left knee sprain.

The Philadelphia Phillies have bolstered their outfield with the addition of Steward Berroa, acquired from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals traded LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith, while the Atlanta Braves acquired RHP Victor Mederos from the Los Angeles Angels for future considerations.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 6-2 defeat at the hands of the Baltimore Orioles. Casey Schmitt led the Giants' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Taylor Clarke earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save. Trea Turner led the Diamondbacks' offense with a strong performance, going 2-for-4 with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 8-2**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured an 8-2 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Tristan Gray leading the offense and Taj Bradley dominating on the mound. Gray hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Bradley pitched five strong innings with seven strikeouts and one earned run.

top_news.title: **Angels Take Down Reds 9-6**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels secured a 9-6 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with José Soriano earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on 7-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, with the move retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Acquire RF Steward Berroa in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have bolstered their outfield with the addition of RF Steward Berroa, acquired from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash. Berroa joins the Phillies' roster on April 8, 2026.
